body_html:
The Faction X Vuarnet Neckwarmer is a collaboration piece between The Faction Collective and Vuarnet. Made with merino wool and crafted in France, this neckwarmer features Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certification and a jacquard design with Vuarnet and Faction logos.

Features

  • Made with luxurious merino wool
  • Crafted in France
  • Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certification
  • Jacquard design with Vuarnet and Faction logos

images.alt: Man wearing a black hoodie with 'FACTION' logo on a gray background
